spec_match.rationale: The page names and displays the exact soft-navigation and interaction-contentful-paint contract: navigationType, numeric navigationId, interactionId, largestInteractionContentfulPaint, and the same-document URL plus contentful-paint heuristic.

interactive.rationale: Controls cover route selection, push/replace/traverse labels, active interaction, contentful paint, render delay, URL-only, paint-only, and clear-log paths with live JSON output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept now matches the feature index by focusing on raw observer payloads and the Chrome 147 attribution identifiers.

edge_cases.rationale: The user can force the no-URL, no-paint, and no-active-interaction failure cases and see why no soft-navigation entry is emitted.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus feature 5144837209194496, WICG Soft Navigations, Chrome documentation, and adjacent concepts.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables, no raw color literals, no inline event handlers, no inline style attributes, and accessible pressed-state buttons.

summary: The observer concept now demonstrates the current Soft Navigation contract and explicit no-entry heuristic failures while keeping SPA URL changes inside the concept route.
